data.overview: Nhân vật A Long (An Chí Kiệt) là một cựu binh vương. Con gái anh bị lừa sang Đông Nam Á vào một đặc khu lừa đảo. Khi thâm nhập vào đây, anh đối đầu với băng đảng của Côn Mạch (Ngũ Doãn Long đóng). Phim xoay quanh hành trình cứu con đầy máu và nước mắt, từ việc phá tan hang ổ lừa đảo đến việc triệt phá đường dây buôn bán nội tạng người.
data.title: Cuồng Nộ Tập Kích

data.biography:
Stacy Martin (born 20 March 1990) is a French actress. Her breakthrough role was playing Joe as a young woman in Lars von Trier's 2013 drama film Nymphomaniac. Other credits include The Childhood of a Leader (2015), All the Money in the World (2017), Amanda (2018), The Evening Hour (2020), Lovers (2020), and The Serpent (2021).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Stacy Martin, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Stacy Martin

data.biography:
Em 2013, Martin atuou como a Jovem Joe com idade entre 15 e 31 anos, no filme dramático de Lars von Trier, Ninfomaníaca. Por seu papel no filme, que teve cenas de sexo real e apresentou pornografia hardcore em alguns casos, Martin teve uma "dublê porno" e usou uma vagina protética. O papel a indicou para o Prêmio Bodil por Melhor Atriz em um Papel Principal. Ela também fez parte do Breakthrough Brits de 2014, que foi organizado pela BAFTA para reconhecer talentos emergentes.

Em junho de 2014, foi anunciado que Martin iria interpretar Faye no próximo filme de Ben Wheatley, High-Rise. Seu próximo papel consistiu no primeiro longa internacional de Matteo Garrone, um filme de fantasia chamado Tale of Tales, que é uma adaptação de Pentamerão, de Giambattista Basile, em que Martin tem o papel da Jovem Dora.

Martin fez parte da campanha da Rag and Bone Primavera 2014, juntamente com Emile Hirsch. Ela também modelou para a Miu Miu em suas campanhas de Outono/Inverno 2014 e 2015. Ela também é o rosto da primeira fragrância da Miu Miu.

Stacy Martin ist eine französisch-britische Schauspielerin.  Martin ist die Tochter einer Britin und eines Franzosen aus dem Département Maine-et-Loire.

2013 debütierte sie in Lars von Triers Erotik-Drama Nymphomaniac, in dem sie die junge Version der Hauptfigur Joe, die in der älteren Version von Charlotte Gainsbourg gespielt wird, verkörpert.

Née en 1990 d'une mère anglaise originaire de Wiltshire, près de Stonehenge et d'un père français originaire du Maine-et-Loire qui exerce la profession de coiffeur, Stacy Martin est fille unique. Elle grandit à Paris, en Angleterre et au Japon, et vit à Londres depuis sa majorité.  Elle travaille dans le mannequinat depuis l'âge de 16 ans. En 2013, elle est choisie par le réalisateur danois Lars von Trier pour incarner le personnage de Joe dans Nymphomaniac. Le personnage adulte de Joe est joué par Charlotte Gainsbourg.
斯泰西·马丁（Stacy Martin，1990年3月20日－）是一位法国女演员。她的突破性角色是在拉尔斯·冯·提尔2013年的剧情片《仙女座》中饰演乔，一个年轻女子。其他作品包括《领导者的童年》（2015）、《世界上所有的钱》（2017）、《阿曼达》（2018）、《晚间时光》（2020）、《情人》（2020年）和《蛇》（2021）。
data.name: 斯塔西·马汀

data.biography: 斯泰西·馬丁（史黛絲·馬田，1990 年 3 月 20 日－）是一位法國女演員。她的突破性角色是在拉爾斯·馮·提爾 2013 年的劇情片《仙女座》中飾演喬，一個年輕女子。其他作品包括《領導者的童年》（2015）、《世界上所有的錢》（2017）、《阿曼達》（2018）、《晚間時光》（2020）、《情人》（2020 年）和《蛇》（2021）。
data.name: 史黛絲·馬田

data.biography: Caterina Silva è un'attrice, cantante e regista italiana, con esperienze in teatro, cinema e televisione.
data.name: Caterina Silva

data.biography: นักแสดงหญิงชาวไทย เริ่มต้นเข้าวงการด้วยงานโฆษณาและมิวสิควิดีโอ ก่อนที่จะเริ่มเล่นมินิซีรีส์เรื่อง "อยู่ที่เรา" และได้เล่นเต็มตัวครั้งแรกในบทของพยาบาลไพริน จากละครโทรทัศน์เรื่อง "I See You พยาบาลพิเศษ..เคสพิศวง"
data.name: ชญานิษฐ์ ชาญสง่าเวช

data.biography: Chayanit Chansangavej (Thai: ชญานิษฐ์ ชาญสง่าเวช; born August 19, 1994), commonly known as Pat, is a Thai-Chinese actress. Her feature film debut was in Distance (2016) and she is commonly known for her roles in Thai dramas Project S: The Series (2017), Stranded (2019), Daughters (2020), and Turn Left Turn Right (2020). She has also starred in indie thriller Someone from Nowhere (2017) and highly-anticipated Cracked (2022) alongside Nickhun.
data.name: Chayanit Chansangavej
